use_cases: Hero section for product landing pages with immersive scroll-driven 3D effects
Feature showcase sections where content scales and rotates as users scroll
Creating depth-rich storytelling experiences with parallax header movement
Animated product or service presentation containers
Modern SaaS landing pages requiring engaging scroll interactions
ai_summary: A scroll-animated container component from Aceternity UI that creates an immersive 3D card effect with scale and rotation transforms driven by scroll progress. Features a perspective-based layout with a header that translates independently at a different rate, creating depth and visual hierarchy. Responsive design adapts dimensions for mobile vs desktop viewing.
